name: Hylic Annihilation Corridor
description: The desire to liberate Hell wells up within every human's heart. Overflows. Poured into this reification engine, it manifests in a lance of psychophasic rage.
effect: Create a Line:5, Width:1 box on the map. Enemies in this box take 1 HP Damage at the end of their turn. The box disappears after combat.

name: Promethean-Grade Hylic Rejection Field
description: Light plucked from distant stars, trapped and writhing within a cage. Released into this lightless realm, it briefly burns away the miasma around you.
effect: Create three Cover tiles in three connected spaces within Range:6. These tiles remain until the end of battle.

name: Thought-Guiding Redirection Circuits
description: When this infra-dimensional neural augment attunes itself to an opponent, it overwhelms them with humanity's righteous fury. For one bright moment, their desires align with the HELLPIERCER's own.
effect: Select a single enemy within Range:5 and use its attack against another enemy. Any invalid, unsupported, or otherwise impossible actions are either unsuccessful, or can be adjudicated by the table.

name: Transient Force Projection
description: Hell itself craves pain and conflict. Promise it with conviction and hellsteel, and even a simple logogrammatic projection will surge with bloodlust.
effect: Select a square within Range:3 of your current position. Make an attack as if you are on that square. The square becomes Void afterwards.

name: Inverted Flagellation-Acceleration Praxis
description: The fight-or-flight response has aided humanity in its survival for unknown eons. Now, thanks to psychedelic thought-sigils and theosophic neurotransmitters that bend neural pathways into ritual shapes, new options are available.
effect: Gain movement equal to damage you have taken this round before this equipment is used.

name: Constrained Reality Modification Circuits
description: Hell is a patchwork of a million forgotten worlds. These circuits reverse the thaumic flow of nearby shards to disrupt Hell's hold over them, and remind them of a time when they were something more.
effect: Centered on yourself, draw a 3x3 box on the current map. Together with your party, come up with a new rule or a tweak for an existing rule. This can be anything: make movement free, allow players to swap positions as an action, give special properties to existing terrain effects, etc. As long as you remain in this box, your rule remains active. If you are pushed out of the box, it vanishes. Rules may not directly adjust the stats of any creature, and must be agreed upon by everyone at the table as consistent with the other rules of the game.

name: Hyper-Synaptic Anchor
description: Look deeper and you'll realize that every Human is linked on a metaphysical level, all of us instinctively reaching out for each other. After all, what else do we have?
effect: Mark an Ally; they gain Retrieve:3. When any player with Retrieve is attacked, they may spend 1 stack of Retrieve to move adjacent to you, or move you adjacent to themselves.

name: Weaponized Pommel
description: Gnostic scientists face a great many problems. Some are so vast and unfathomable that even inventing the hyperlanguage required to describe them can take years. "How many weapons can a HELLPIERCER get away with?" is not one of them.
effect: When TACCOM begins, choose two Effects from the following list: Bound:3, Bleed:2, Poison:4, Slow:2, Healing:5, Haste:1. When you attack an adjacent creature, instead of your normal attack, you may choose to deal 1 damage and apply 1 of the chosen Effects. You may target player characters for this attack.

name: Zoe-Emulation Soul Cloning Engine
description: Eupraxia found her first fragment of the second Eve in a gilded cage beneath the library of Abraxas. Since then, she has scoured reality and found 104 more. Through studying this isopsephic matter, we gain a better understanding of Eve-Sophia's power.
effect: Select an enemy within Range:4. Create a shadow clone of them anywhere within Range:4. This copy remains in place until the enemies turn. Any damage the copy receives is applied to the targeted enemy. On the enemies turn, the enemy teleports to the shadow clone's location, removes the shadow clone from play, and explodes, dealing 2D6 in Burst:1, not including damaging itself. If the enemy dies before their turn, they instantly teleport to the shadow clone's location, remove the shadow clone from play, and deal 4D6 damage in Burst:3.

name: Oblivion Induction Ritual Device
description: This ritual is so beautifully, mathematically devastating that even its component equations are volatile, and must be stored in rune-sealed calcutronium. Do not decipher, interpret, or observe these components under any circumstances.
effect: Within Range:5, create a Cross:2 pattern and deal 2D6 damage to all creatures within.

name: Motes of Bountiful Forethought
description: These fragments of crystallized prophecy envision the future with such beautiful efficiency that HELLPIERCERS who decide to deploy them occasionally find one in their hands already.
effect: Select 3 spaces within Range:5 of your current position. Those spaces become advantageous terrain.
